purpose: Distinguish production-blocking missing features from valid structural nulls in live decision-time inference rows.
scoring_null_handling: The approved V1 signal scorer fills numeric NaN values with medians from the approved preprocess artifact before XGBoost prediction. This policy only allows nulls that are valid market-structure absence, not implementation gaps.
notes: Ranked liquidity slots are structural nulls when fewer visible decision-time BSL/SSL levels exist.
Pairwise ranked topology fields are structural nulls when either side of the pair does not exist.
Nearest active FVG context fields are structural nulls when no active decision-time bullish or bearish FVG of that type exists.
Candle-quality and focused-quality ratio fields are structural nulls when the denominator leg has zero measurable impulse/body/displacement.
Deeper ISL fields are structural nulls when no deeper protected low exists at decision time.
Range context fields are structural nulls when no active range is present at decision time.
Premium/discount position percentage is structural null when the decision-time payload has no active premium/discount state.
Nearest active SH/ISH/SL/ISL distance and level-age fields are structural nulls when no active decision-time structure level exists in the requested direction.
Base ISH and target-distance aliases are structural nulls only when the source detector explicitly has no such decision-time level; they are not post-decision targets.
Nearest liquidity fields and two-sided pressure/distance ratios are structural nulls when the relevant decision-time BSL/SSL side does not exist.
This policy does not allow missing feature sources such as macro, payload technical context, liquidity aggregation, or focused quality formulas.
